claims.headline: Calmer focus with caffeine
claims.notesSentence: Combined L-theanine + caffeine improved attention-switching accuracy and reduced susceptibility to distraction.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: L-theanine and caffeine attention study on PubMed

claims.headline: Eases stress
claims.notesSentence: A 4-week RCT in healthy adults reported reduced stress-related symptoms and improved cognitive measures.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: L-theanine stress and cognition RCT on PubMed
